title: Palimbang Heat Wave
lead: Palimbang is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.31. The city's temperature anomaly is at a record high, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.6 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 77%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is at 5.3 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
